description: Tuned for United National Dairy (KSA). Senses real-time POS + route-level sell-through divergence, returns risk, and SKU mix mismatch by route. Answers what each truck should carry today, where sell-through is breaking down, and which routes need pre-positioning.
tooltip_text: UND-tuned route-to-market sensing — what each truck should carry, where returns are climbing, where to rebalance.

show.label: Today's truck load
show.text: What should each truck carry on Route RTE-RIYADH-12 today, by SKU and quantity?

show.label: Routes with high returns
show.text: Which routes are running above the 10% returns threshold this week?

show.label: Sell-through gap
show.text: Where is actual sell-through diverging from forecast by more than 15% on a per-route basis?

show.label: Mix mismatch by route
show.text: Which SKU × route pairs are mis-loaded vs actual demand pattern this week?

analyse.label: Repeat-offender routes
analyse.text: Which routes have repeatedly returned the same SKUs for the last 4 weeks — what's the pattern?

analyse.label: Salesman judgement drift
analyse.text: Where has driver judgement on truck loading drifted away from actual route demand?

analyse.label: Pre-holiday shift
analyse.text: How is route-level demand shifting in the 3 days before the next public holiday across Riyadh routes?

analyse.label: Top missed opportunities
analyse.text: Which SKUs are showing strong POS signal at routes where they were under-loaded today?

diagnose.label: Why returns at RTE-12
diagnose.text: Why is RTE-RIYADH-12 returning 12% of LABAN-500ML this week — what's the root cause?

diagnose.label: Sell-through drop
diagnose.text: Diagnose the sell-through drop on YOGURT-PLAIN-500G across the Eastern routes.

diagnose.label: Truck mix bias
diagnose.text: Why does the current truck-load template skew toward MILK-FULL-1L on routes where LABAN is the bigger seller?

solve.label: Recommend truck load
solve.text: Recommend the optimal SKU + quantity load for every truck on the Riyadh North routes for tomorrow.

solve.label: Cut returns by 5pp
solve.text: Give me a 7-day plan to cut returns from 10% to under 5% on the worst 5 routes.

solve.label: SKU priority by route
solve.text: For each Riyadh route, list the top 5 SKUs to prioritise on the truck and the why.

solve.label: Sell-through lift
solve.text: What's the SKU × route action set that lifts sell-through the most over the next 2 weeks?

simulate.label: Swap mix on RTE-12
simulate.text: If I swap 30% of MILK-FULL-1L for LABAN-500ML on RTE-RIYADH-12, what's the projected returns + sell-through change?

simulate.label: Drop dead SKUs
simulate.text: If I stop loading the 3 lowest-velocity SKUs on every truck, how much capacity is freed and what's the lost-sale risk?

simulate.label: Rebalance Riyadh
simulate.text: If I rebalance load between Riyadh North and Riyadh South based on POS velocity, where do total returns land?

simulate.label: Add a new route
simulate.text: If I add an extra mid-day RTE-RIYADH-12B for high-velocity stores, what's the lift in same-day sell-through?
